66cd4c3ec5459312fdcc5749.question: Yvonne Fletcher was shot dead outside one of these locations during anti-Gaddafi protests. Operation Infinite Reach was launched after two of these places in Dar es Salaam and Nairobi were bombed on the same day by al-Qaeda. The Algiers Accords ended an event in one of these places, which saw fake visas issued to Canadians. That (*) 444-day event in one of these places was resolved on the day of Ronald Reagan’s inauguration. Operation Eagle Claw failed to rescue 66 hostages in one of these places in Tehran during the Iranian Revolution. For 10 points, name these places in a nation’s capital that house diplomats.
66cd4c3ec5459312fdcc5749.question_sanitized: Yvonne Fletcher was shot dead outside one of these locations during anti-Gaddafi protests. Operation Infinite Reach was launched after two of these places in Dar es Salaam and Nairobi were bombed on the same day by al-Qaeda. The Algiers Accords ended an event in one of these places, which saw fake visas issued to Canadians. That (*) 444-day event in one of these places was resolved on the day of Ronald Reagan's inauguration. Operation Eagle Claw failed to rescue 66 hostages in one of these places in Tehran during the Iranian Revolution. For 10 points, name these places in a nation's capital that house diplomats.
66cd4c3ec5459312fdcc5749.answer: embassy [or embassies; accept chancery buildings or chanceries; accept Libyan or U.S. embassies; do NOT accept or prompt on “consulates”]
